prompt: This comment is stored and later shown to every visitor. What can an attacker most directly achieve?
code_snippet:
out.write("

" + comment + "

"); // comment is stored and shown to all users

options.text: Execute attacker-controlled JavaScript in other users' browsers — steal sessions or act as them
Read arbitrary rows from the database

explanation: Stored, unencoded input runs as script in every viewer's browser — stored XSS (CWE-79) — letting the attacker steal session cookies or perform actions as the victim. The distractors are server-side impacts (SQLi, command injection, SSRF), but XSS executes in the browser.
